_doc: Allowlist for check-tag-ci-coverage.mjs. Each entry maps a `@tag` (key) to a reason string explaining why it intentionally has no CI path. Tags listed here are reported but don't fail the check. Entries should be reviewed quarterly — see them all with `node scripts/check-tag-ci-coverage.mjs --strict`. Remove the `_doc` key in production use, or leave it; the script ignores it.
_examples: @local-only: requires a local browser session; @manual-visual: requires human eyes; @flaky-investigating: temporarily quarantined while a flake is diagnosed (give a date)
@local-only: requires a local Playwright browser session; not safe to run in CI
@manual-visual: requires human visual review; not automatable
